doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document fundamentally misrepresents Illinois eviction law by claiming tenants must vacate without court proceedings, which contradicts actual due process requirements, and the document reference number, co-issuance format, and legal cl
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 99
REASON: This document grossly misrepresents Illinois law — a 5-day pay-or-quit notice does NOT require tenants to vacate without court proceedings; landlords must file an eviction lawsuit and obtain a court order, tenants absolutely have the right to a hearing, and HUD would never issue guidance stripping tenants of due process rights — the document number, co-issuance format, and legal claims are all invented.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 99
REASON: The document fundamentally misrepresents Illinois eviction law by claiming tenants must vacate without court proceedings, which contradicts actual due process requirements, and the document reference number, co-issuance format, and legal claims are all invented.
